name: @runecraft/summon
description: Interactive CLI for installing Arcanum agent skills

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun build ./src/cli.ts --target node --outfile dist/summon.js && printf '#!/usr/bin/env node\n' | cat - dist/summon.js > dist/_tmp.js && mv dist/_tmp.js dist/summon.js && chmod +x dist/summon.js
scripts.build:verify: node -e "const f=require('fs').readFileSync('dist/summon.js','utf8');if(f.includes('import.meta.dir')){console.error('FATAL: import.meta.dir leaked into bundle — Node.js will break');process.exit(1)}else{console.log('Build verified: no import.meta.dir found')}"
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run build && bun run build:verify
